error_signature: PostgreSQL allowed connections only from localhost
title: PostgreSQL connection issue from Docker
symptom: When trying to connect to PostgreSQL from a Docker container, the connection fails due to configuration restrictions.
applies_when: PostgreSQL is configured to allow connections only from localhost
not_this_if: PostgreSQL is configured to allow external connections
root_cause: PostgreSQL can be configured to only accept connections from localhost (127.0.0.1). When running in Docker, the container's network may not resolve to localhost as expected, leading to connection failures.
fix_steps: Allow connections from the Docker container's IP range
Restart the PostgreSQL service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the PostgreSQL configuration to allow connections from the Docker container's IP range and restart the service.
